summary: Comprehensive testing of Profile and Notifications API integration. All 15 backend API tests passed (2 skipped due to no notifications). Frontend Profile page successfully fetches real data from API (showing 'Marco Rossi' with updated bio). Notifications page correctly falls back to sample data when API returns empty array.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 422 status - not critical for profile/notifications functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND - GET /api/profile/me returns user profile with all expected fields
BACKEND - GET /api/profile/me returns 401 for invalid token
BACKEND - PUT /api/profile/me updates profile fields and persists changes
BACKEND - GET /api/profile/me/friends returns friends list (empty array)
BACKEND - GET /api/profile/me/posts returns user posts (empty array)
BACKEND - GET /api/profile/me/mutual-friends returns suggestions (empty array)
BACKEND - POST /api/profile/avatar accepts file upload
BACKEND - POST /api/profile/cover accepts file upload
BACKEND - GET /api/notifications returns notifications with unread_count
BACKEND - GET /api/notifications returns 401 for invalid token
BACKEND - GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count
BACKEND - POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
BACKEND - DELETE /api/notifications/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
BACKEND - Profile API returns all 18 expected fields for frontend
BACKEND - Notifications API returns correct structure
FRONTEND - Profile page loads at /profile route
FRONTEND - Profile displays real API data (Marco Rossi, Test bio update from pytest)
FRONTEND - Profile stats display (0 amici, 0 post)
FRONTEND - Edit profile modal opens and saves changes to backend
FRONTEND - Avatar upload button present and functional
FRONTEND - Cover upload button present and functional
FRONTEND - Friends section displays
FRONTEND - Posts section displays
FRONTEND - Notifications page loads at /notifications route
FRONTEND - Notifications header and search button present
FRONTEND - Today and Previous sections display
FRONTEND - Mark all as read button works
FRONTEND - Notification options modal opens with remove/mute/report options
critical_code_review_comments: Profile API integration working correctly - fetches real user data from backend
Notifications API integration working - correctly falls back to sample data when API returns empty
Fixed Notifications.jsx to properly parse API response structure { notifications: [...], unread_count: ... }
Photo upload endpoints (avatar/cover) are functional and accept file uploads
Friends list and posts use sample data as fallback when API returns empty (as documented in mocked_api)
seed_data_creation: None - Profile data exists in database, notifications empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile and Notifications API integration tested and working. Profile page fetches real data from /api/profile/me. Notifications page falls back to SAMPLE_NOTIFICATIONS when API returns empty array (expected behavior). Auth token can be set in localStorage as 'auth_token'. WebSocket connection fails with 422 but doesn't affect profile/notifications functionality.

mocked_apis_list: Friends list - uses FRIENDS_LIST constant as fallback when API returns empty
Posts - uses SAMPLE_POSTS constant as fallback when API returns empty
Notifications - uses SAMPLE_NOTIFICATIONS constant as fallback when API returns empty
mocked_apis.note: Fallback to sample data is intentional design for demo purposes when user has no real data

profile_endpoints.GET /api/profile/me: Working - returns user profile with all fields
profile_endpoints.PUT /api/profile/me: Working - updates and persists profile changes
